chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1183 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For order on office objection No.1 2. For hearing of CMA No.6066/2025 3. For hearing of main case. 17-04-2025 Mr. Sauban Tasleem, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for respondent department Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Comments filed on behalf of the respondent department are taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits under instructions that the petition has served its purpose, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
